name: XFINITY 500
comments: Ryan Blaney won the Xfinity 500 at Martinsville Speedway, his 13th NASCAR Cup Series victory. Prior to green flag, the following cars dropped to the rear for the reasons indicated: Nos. 2, 51, 11 (unapproved adjustments).
